things.name: Skoda Museum
things.description: The official museum of Skoda Auto, founded in 1895 in Mlada Boleslav; over 350 historic vehicles spanning 120 years of Czech automotive history

things.name: Mlada Boleslav Castle
things.description: Renaissance castle complex housing the Regional Museum with collections on local history, archaeology and the Skoda factory's early days

things.name: Church of the Assumption of the Virgin Mary
things.description: Impressive Gothic church in the old town centre dating from the 15th century, with a beautifully preserved baroque interior and tower views

things.name: Stare Namesti (Old Town Square)
things.description: Historic market square at the heart of the old town surrounded by Renaissance burghers' houses and the early Gothic Town Hall

things.name: Kakadu Park
things.description: Popular riverside recreation area along the Jizera river offering walking trails, sports facilities and picnic areas for families

things.name: Mlada Boleslav Synagogue
things.description: 19th-century neo-Romanesque synagogue; one of Bohemia's best-preserved Jewish heritage buildings, now used as a cultural space

things.name: City Gallery Navrátil
things.description: Municipal art gallery presenting changing exhibitions of Czech contemporary art in a historic building in the town centre

things.name: Jizera River Walk
things.description: Scenic riverside promenade along the Jizera offering cycling and walking paths through green meadows surrounding the historic town

things.name: Boleslav Fortress Remains
things.description: Preserved remnants of the medieval city fortifications including towers and walls that once surrounded the historic Boleslavian settlement

things.name: Stadion Skoda Mlada Boleslav
things.description: Home of FK Mlada Boleslav with an 8,000-seat capacity; the club has competed in UEFA Europa and Conference League qualifying rounds
